{{Quote|Lowan, you're a stain.|Lara Notsil|<ref name="X-Wing: Iron Fist">''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]''</ref>}}
'''Lowan''' was the smug student leader of [[Gara Petothel|Lara Notsil's]] training group at [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] pilot school. He was given the duty of informing Notsil that she had been transferred to [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Atton Repness]]'s [[Screaming Wookiee Squadron|Screaming Wookiee training squadron]] for remedial pilot training.

Notsil, actually an undercover [[Gara Petothel]], knew that she could outfly him on the worst of her days in the cockpit; She decided, however, not to continue her verbal bout with him or to shoot an imaginary target on his head as she would have liked, but to go about her mission so as to return as an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] pilot and have the chance to vape him in a dogfight.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Iron Fist (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
